<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Builder; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Stub\Stub as BaseStub; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This interface is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ interface Stub extends Identity { /** * Stubs the matching method with the stub object $stub. Any invocations of * the matched method will now be handled by the stub instead. */ public function will(BaseStub $stub): Identity; }
